title: Required<T>
description: `Required<{name?; age?; createdAt?: Date}>` strips optionality from every property, resolving to the all-required object `{name: string; age: number; createdAt: Date}`; the serializer encodes the resolved (now mandatory) shape across JSON and binary.
notes: Required<T> removes the `?` modifiers, so every property is expected on the wire — the wire shape carries no optional/absent slots.
The mandatory `createdAt` Date round-trips via ISO string (JSON) / 8-byte float64 epoch (binary).
pureType: createJsonEncoder<Required<{name?: string; age?: number; createdAt?: Date}>>(undefined, {strategy: 'clone'})
